title: First Ancestral Race XelNaga
wikitext:
[]: First Ancestral Race = Xel'Naga             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Dec 21, 2006 3:43 am Angels = Protoss+Zerg NERV = Terran After this blatant comparison to the ever popular RTS game Starcraft, I must get to the point of this thread, that is, things in other works of fiction that, while not directly related to the series, remind you of Evangelion in any way or form and parallels between Eva and other works. In before all of the Rei wannabes in anime nowadays. In before HURR RAHXEPHON DURR By the way, this thread might be more interesting if the works described aren't all anime, as a lot of anime has been influenced by Eva and others just blatantly copy the series. Also, MY LIFE FOR AIUR

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu Dec 21, 2006 7:32 pm Israfel is all KEKEKEKE ANGEL RUSH Ahem.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Dec 22, 2006 12:42 pm Xenogears has tang

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sat Dec 23, 2006 2:35 am Xenogears = Evangelion RPG xD

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sat Dec 23, 2006 3:08 pm HURR RAHXEPHON DURR

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Dec 23, 2006 3:43 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: HURR RAHXEPHON DURR

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sat Dec 23, 2006 7:58 pm FF7 some kabbalah krap, oh and Sephiroth and the D Type Armor

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Dec 23, 2006 7:59 pm Gunparade March is similar to NGE in that both are centered around a mostly harmless student trying to lead a normal life while piloting a big-ass mecha against a mysterious enemy. IN AFTER MAGGOTMASTER HURR

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Sat Dec 23, 2006 11:11 pm Legend of Dragoon? Just tossing that one out there.

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Mon Dec 25, 2006 7:34 pm What the hell is going on in this thread?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Dec 26, 2006 3:32 am Going the other way, Eva clearly reiterates a lot of tropes from SF 1930-1970 - race consciousness as the next big leap, comparable with the emergence of multicellular life forms; forerunner races seeding the galaxy.

Article: First Ancestral Race XelNaga
[]: First Ancestral Race = Xel'Naga             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Dec 21, 2006 3:43 am Angels = Protoss+Zerg NERV = Terran After this blatant comparison to the ever popular RTS game Starcraft, I must get to the point of this thread, that is, things in other works of fiction that, while not directly related to the series, remind you of Evangelion in any way or form and parallels between Eva and other works. In before all of the Rei wannabes in anime nowadays. In before HURR RAHXEPHON DURR By the way, this thread might be more interesting if the works described aren't all anime, as a lot of anime has been influenced by Eva and others just blatantly copy the series. Also, MY LIFE FOR AIUR
